channel.title: GitHub Svelte Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Svelte in GitHub

item.title: saadeghi/daisyui
item.description: 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼  The most popular, free and open-source Tailwind CSS component library

item.title: huntabyte/shadcn-svelte
item.description: shadcn/ui, but for Svelte. ✨

item.title: pluja/whishper
item.description: Transcribe any audio to text, translate and edit subtitles 100% locally with a web UI. Powered by whisper models!

item.title: rajnandan1/kener
item.description: Stunning status pages, batteries included!

item.title: leaningtech/webvm
item.description: Virtual Machine for the Web

item.title: rishikanthc/Scriberr
item.description: Self-hosted AI audio transcription

item.title: Abdenasser/neohtop
item.description: 💪🏻 system monitoring on steroids

item.title: snoww/loa-logs
item.description: LOA Logs - Modern DPS Meter for Lost Ark

item.title: primocms/primo
item.description: Primo is a visual CMS with a built-in code editor, Svelte blocks, and static site generator.

item.title: CriticalMoments/CMSaasStarter
item.description: A modern SaaS template/boilerplate built with SvelteKit, Tailwind, and Supabase. Includes marketing page, blog, subscriptions, auth, user dashboard, user settings, pricing page, and more.

item.title: ChurchApps/FreeShow
item.description: FreeShow is a free and open-source, user-friendly presenter software.

item.title: themesberg/flowbite-svelte
item.description: Official Svelte components built for Flowbite and Tailwind CSS

item.title: GoodiesHQ/headscale-admin
item.description: Admin Web Interface for juanfont/headscale

item.title: Figma-Linux/figma-linux
item.description: Figma is the first interface design tool based in the browser, making it easier for teams to create software. Join us in https://t.me/figma_linux

item.title: vkurko/calendar
item.description: Full-sized drag & drop JavaScript event calendar with resource & timeline views

item.title: TheOnlyWayUp/WattpadDownloader
item.description: Wattpad Books to EPUB Files. 🪙Download Paid Stories! Metadata and Cover Support 🏷️, Lightweight Frontend 🐇, Dockerized 🐳, Rapid Generation ⚡, API Support 🌐

item.title: SOH69/mm_radio
item.description: A Radio Script for Fivem Server

item.title: BetterDiscord/Installer
item.description: A simple standalone program which automates the installation, removal and maintenance of BetterDiscord.

item.title: techniq/layerchart
item.description: Composable Svelte chart components to build a wide range of visualizations

item.title: seanmorley15/AdventureLog
item.description: Self-hostable travel tracker and trip planner.

item.title: skeletonlabs/skeleton
item.description: Skeleton is an adaptive design system powered by Tailwind CSS.
